approval_gates.name: Tech Stack Selection & Evaluation
approval_gates.description: Architecture blueprint defines tech stack. Human must approve tech choices (Supabase, Railway, Vercel, React Native, Stitch, etc.) before prototyping begins.
approval_gates.notes: Approved with change: Replace Gemini AI with Opencode/DeepSeek platform. WhatsApp included in POC.

approval_gates.name: Infrastructure Costing & Account Setup
approval_gates.description: Cloud provider selection, pricing tier evaluation, account provisioning. Requires review of cost estimates vs budget.
approval_gates.notes: Approved. ₹0/month POC infra cost confirmed. Opencode/DeepSeek platform replaces Gemini AI (no additional cost).

approval_gates.name: MVP Scope Definition
approval_gates.description: Formal MVP boundary drawn. Release milestones defined. Requires sign-off from product, engineering, and business stakeholders.
approval_gates.notes: MVP scope approved. Auth-first approach validated. Sprints 1-6 (12 weeks) greenlit.

approval_gates.name: Production Deployment Go/No-Go
approval_gates.description: Final sign-off before production rollout. QA must pass, security scan must clear, stakeholders must approve.

dashboard_summary.last_milestone: QA AGENT v2.0 COMPLETED: E2E Automation Framework built — Playwright config, 39 E2E tests (6 spec files), test selection mechanism (sandbox/CI), QA dashboard enhanced with env toggle, collector script merges Vitest+Playwright results, CI pipeline updated. NEXT: HITL approval for agents 07a-07d, then 09-15, then production deployment.

00_supervisor_agent.notes: Watches STATE_MATRIX.json. Auto-launches agents when dependencies met. Monitors guardrails. Escalates on circuit-breaker or HITL gates. Does NOT make decisions — only orchestrates.

01_ideation_agent.role: Product Marketing Manager & Hyper-Local Retail Economics Specialist

expert_reviewer.industry_jd_reference: GTM Strategy Lead / Retail Economics Specialist — evaluates market research depth, UVP differentiation, merchant dataset completeness, and monetization model viability.
review_feedback: Market research covers all 21 Pete markets with 406 merchants. Enhanced fields (timings, payments, GST, languages) add depth. Approved by human gatekeeper.

01_ideation_agent.notes: ENHANCED UPDATE (v3.0): Expanded from 392 to 406 merchants. Added 14 new Google Maps-resolved merchants. Enhanced ALL merchants with 17 new fields. Awaiting HITL approval.

expert_reviewer.role_title: Senior Product Manager / VP of Product
expert_reviewer.industry_jd_reference: Technical Product Manager (E-commerce) — validates requirement completeness, priority alignment to business goals, cost boundary accuracy, and workflow coverage across web and mobile channels.
review_feedback: Expanded from 46 to 103 Requirement IDs across 10 categories. VP-level review conducted — added 32 new requirements including performance, DR, maintenance, funnels, data licensing, AI try-on, jewellery features, branding, multi-city, ShipRocket, kill switch, and unique differentiators. MVP scope tier defined. Approved by human gatekeeper.

02_requirement_agent.notes: PRD ENHANCED (v2.0): 96 reqs + 7 new (103 total). Added: kill switch (INFRA-011), reviews (UI-021, BE-025), Virtual Walk (UI-022), Live Bazaar (UI-023), Co-Shopping (UI-024), Virtual St. CMS (BE-026). §9 MVP Scope defined. Awaiting HITL approval.

expert_reviewer.industry_jd_reference: Enterprise Solution Architect — reviews technical blueprint, API strategy, caching layer, message-queue architecture, security framework, and infrastructure costing. Must validate feasibility of 103 requirements against chosen tech stack.
review_feedback: APPROVED with changes: (1) Replace Gemini AI with Opencode/DeepSeek platform for any AI features, (2) Include WhatsApp integration in POC scope, (3) Generate synthetic product-level inventory for all 8 pilot merchants since real inventory arrays are empty.

03_architect_agent.notes: Architecture complete. Google Stitch integrated as primary UI design tool. APPROVED by human gatekeeper with changes: Opencode/DeepSeek replaces Gemini, WhatsApp included in POC, synthetic inventory to be generated.

04_prototype_agent.role: Senior Prototyping Engineer / Concept Verification Engine

expert_reviewer.industry_jd_reference: Prototyping Lead — validates POC functionality against architecture spec, sample data quality, and launch readiness of the prototype workspace.
review_feedback: APPROVED as imperfect — moving to full product build. Key gaps identified: (1) Missing auth/personas (Customer/Merchant/Admin), (2) Poor UX labels (Sell, MOQ, Featured), (3) Incoherent flow between pages, (4) Not demo-ready for friends/stakeholders. Full build (Agents 05-15) will address all gaps with proper workflows reviewed by Sr Product/VP roles.

04_prototype_agent.notes: POC approved as imperfect. Moving to full product build. Gaps: auth/personas missing, UX labels confusing, flow not cohesive.

05_program_mgmt_agent.role: Senior Agile Program Manager & Scrum Master

expert_reviewer.industry_jd_reference: Agile Program Manager — reviews epic/story decomposition, sprint plans, dependency mapping, milestone timelines, and MVP scope definition against PRD requirements.
review_feedback: MVP scope approved. Auth-first approach validated. Sprints 1-6 (12 weeks) covers core workflows. Deferred items documented.

05_program_mgmt_agent.notes: Full product sprint plan created: 26 Epics, 113 User Stories, 12 Sprints (24 weeks), MVP = Sprints 1-6. Auth-first approach. APPROVED by human gatekeeper.

06_infra_devops_agent.role: DevOps Systems Architect & Core Supply Chain Automation Engine

expert_reviewer.industry_jd_reference: DevOps/Platform Architect — validates CI/CD pipeline design, Docker/K8s configuration, GitHub branching strategy, secrets management approach, and rollback protocols.

06_infra_devops_agent.notes: v2 ENHANCED: Added automated code review pipeline — PR-Agent (AI review), SonarQube Cloud (static analysis + MCP server), Reviewdog (ESLint/TS linting), CodeQL (already present in security-scan.yml). MCP server configured for on-demand SonarQube queries. AGENTS.md updated with pipeline documentation. 6 GitHub Action workflows total.

expert_reviewer.industry_jd_reference: Frontend Lead (React/React Native) — validates responsive wireframes, component architecture, mobile UX, accessibility, and frontend unit test coverage above 80%.

07a_ui_agent.notes: v2 UPDATE: Auth page rewritten with dual Email+Phone tabs, persona selection (Customer/Merchant/Admin), 6-digit OTP flow, role-based redirects. Merchant/Admin dashboards updated with auth guards. No POC/Demo labels. Awaiting HITL approval.

expert_reviewer.industry_jd_reference: API Architect — validates RESTful endpoint design, request/response schemas, authentication boundaries, rate limiting, and API security validation passes.

07b_api_agent.notes: API specification complete: 21+ RESTful endpoints designed, 8 test files, Zod validation, auth middleware, rate limiting. Awaiting HITL approval.

expert_reviewer.industry_jd_reference: Database Architect — validates schema design, indexing strategy, connection pooling, migration rollback scripts, caching strategy, and query performance under concurrency.

07c_backend_db_agent.notes: v2.0 UPDATE: Schema upgraded for email+password auth. Added password_hash, auth_provider columns. 36 total indexes (34 v1 + 2 v2). 5 demo email accounts with bcrypt passwords. V2 migration with FULL rollback. Data export (10 sheets). Awaiting HITL approval.

expert_reviewer.industry_jd_reference: Integration Architect — validates end-to-end data flow, authentication handshakes across layers, event trigger chains, security audit clearance, and absence of debug flags.

07d_integration_agent.notes: v2 INTEGRATION VERIFIED: 0 build errors, 45 pages, 35 API routes. Email+Phone auth flows all PASS. 406 merchants, 21 markets, 2,042 products loaded. Role-based redirects verified. Protected routes return 401. Merchant/Admin dashboards functional. Awaiting HITL approval.

expert_reviewer.industry_jd_reference: QA Lead — validates test plan completeness, automated test coverage thresholds, regression suite, E2E Playwright tests, test selection mechanism, QA web dashboard, and Go/No-Go recommendation for staging promotion.
review_feedback: E2E AUTOMATION FRAMEWORK COMPLETED: Playwright config with chromium/firefox/webkit matrix, 39 E2E tests across 6 spec files (home, auth, customer-journey, merchant-flow, admin-flow, api-health). Test selection mechanism via qa-dashboard/test-run-config.json with sandbox vs CI/CD profiles. Web dashboard at /qa-dashboard with KPIs, charts, quality gates, defect log, test type grid, and environment toggle. Collector script aggregates Vitest + Playwright results. CI pipeline runs E2E in separate job with artifact upload. approved.

08_qa_agent.notes: v2.0 E2E AUTOMATION FRAMEWORK COMPLETED: Playwright config with multi-browser matrix, 39 E2E tests across 6 spec files (home, auth, customer-journey, merchant-flow, admin-flow, api-health). Test selection mechanism via qa-dashboard/test-run-config.json (sandbox vs CI/CD profiles with 15 test types each). QA web dashboard enhanced with environment toggle and test type selector. Collector script merges Vitest + Playwright results. CI pipeline runs E2E in separate job with Playwright artifact uploads. Use npm run qa:run (sandbox) or npm run qa:run:ci (CI).

expert_reviewer.industry_jd_reference: Release Manager — validates staging sign-off, production deployment scripts, post-deployment monitoring, and final Go/No-Go status before live rollout.

09_production_agent.notes: Production deployment report complete: 21 API endpoints, 41 pages, 25 dynamic routes, 3 demo accounts, LOW risk, GO recommendation. Awaiting GATE-PRODUCTION-01 HITL sign-off.

expert_reviewer.industry_jd_reference: Technical Writing Lead — validates help file coverage, i18n key mapping, installation guide completeness, style guide compliance, and release notes accuracy.

expert_reviewer.role_title: Senior Customer Success Manager / Operations Lead
expert_reviewer.industry_jd_reference: Customer Onboarding Lead — validates acquisition pipeline design, account provisioning flow, merchant onboarding guides, billing integration, and support ticket routing.
Growth Marketing Lead — validates campaign architecture, SEO strategy, meta-tag maps, social media assets, video scripts, and analytics tracking setup.
Site Reliability Lead — validates monitoring setup, incident response playbooks, auto-remediation scripts, patch validation in sandbox, and DevOps pipeline clearance for hotfixes.

expert_reviewer.role_title: Senior FinOps Analyst / Cloud Cost Lead
expert_reviewer.industry_jd_reference: FinOps Lead — validates cloud spend tracking against budget, LLM token consumption monitoring, cost anomaly detection thresholds, and auto-scaling cost projections.
Security Lead — validates secrets scanning across branches, API key exposure checks, encryption standards, compliance variance detection, and credential isolation in vault.
